description: the examiner-rung gate: an EARNED passing Q-record (composer+) covering the scope AND lineage independence from the producer whose work would be examined (H6 - the second lineage is constitutional)
rules: standing is earned, never asserted: no Q-record, uncovered scope -> refused
lineage independence, fail-closed: self-examination, shared ancestry line, or an UNKNOWN lineage all refuse
the exit code IS the verdict
usage: Set PERFORMER_LOT + PRODUCER_LOT + Q_LEDGER (the chained Q-record store) + LINEAGE ({lot: [parent lots]} map). Optional SCOPE. Output: examine.json.
limitation: Checks ancestor/descendant lines from the LINEAGE map; full lineage diversity (diverse double-build) is P5.3's, not this gate's.
